component_rule_contract.rule: Generate continuation ranks only from point-in-time historical prices available before entry.
Generate dislocation/reclaim candidates from adjusted OHLCV without using future recovery labels.
Require a point-in-time event timestamp and a separate direction source before any event sleeve trade.
Use traded-dollar sampling only when the source data resolution supports reconstruction without survivorship leakage.

data_contract.minimum_history: At least one complete train/validation/test chronology with delisted symbols retained.
data_contract.raw_payload_policy: Retain provider manifest, query bounds, and immutable raw payload hashes before deriving trades.

execution_contract.chronology: Train/validation/test split must be fixed before trade generation.
execution_contract.costs: Use declared component costs or stricter costs; no post-hoc cost relaxation.
execution_contract.promotion: Promotion remains forbidden until a separate final decision passes after true-data validation.
execution_contract.weights: Frozen semantic sleeve weights; no Sharpe/return optimization on historical outcomes.

frozen_sleeves.name: Momentum sleeve
frozen_sleeves.rule: Hold diversified continuation candidates only through the frozen multi-day horizon.

frozen_sleeves.name: Mean-reversion sleeve
frozen_sleeves.rule: Buy diversified dislocations after confirmation; do not average down into unresolved continuation.

frozen_sleeves.name: Catalyst sleeve
frozen_sleeves.rule: Keep the component rule frozen and treat it as one bounded sleeve inside the composite.

frozen_sleeves.name: Dollar-bar microstructure sleeve
frozen_sleeves.rule: Use traded-dollar sampling as a stabilizer, not as standalone promotion evidence.
